title: Smoky Bitter Irish Kale Salad
description: A bright, bitter kale salad with smoky paprika, bay leaf, and crunchy walnuts, topped with a citrusy lemon dressing - perfect for a quick, sugarfree, comforting lunch.
instructions: Wash kale and spinach, pat dry, and chop the stems of the kale.
In a large bowl, combine the kale, spinach, toasted walnuts, and toasted sunflower seeds.
Crush the bay leaf into a fine crumble and add it to the bowl.
Sprinkle the smoked paprika, smoked sea salt, and a pinch of pepper over the salad and toss to coat evenly.
Whisk together the lemon juice, lemon zest, olive oil, a pinch of salt, and pepper until the dressing emulsifies.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss until every leaf is coated.
Let the salad rest for 5 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Serve immediately, optionally garnishing with extra toasted nuts or seeds.
